agentConfig.description: Invoke an AI agent with a prompt for freeform LLM processing within the workflow.

contextPaths.description: Comma-separated $.path references to include as additional context (e.g. $.nodes.transform1.output, $.input.data)

prompt.description: User message prompt for the agent. Supports Mustache templates: {{input.key}}, {{nodes.nodeId.field}}, {{variables.key}}

responseVariable.description: Optional workflow variable name to store the agent's response in.

agentConfig.title: Agent Node Config

agent_taskConfig.description: Use an AI agent to automatically resolve a task by choosing from predefined outcomes. Optionally falls back to a human task on failure.

agentId.description: The AI agent that will decide the task outcome.

contextPaths.description: Comma-separated $.path references to include as additional context (e.g. $.nodes.transform1.output, $.input.data)

fallbackToHuman.description: If enabled and the agent fails to resolve the task, a human task will be created instead and the workflow will wait for manual resolution.

prompt.description: Additional prompt context for the agent. Supports Mustache templates: {{input.key}}, {{nodes.nodeId.field}}, {{variables.key}}

taskDefinitionId.description: The task definition template that defines the available outcomes/options.

agent_taskConfig.title: Agent Task Node Config

assertConfig.description: Validates a condition and fails the workflow or branches based on result

message.description: Error message if assertion fails (supports {{$.path}} templates)

softFail.description: If true, outputs {passed: false} instead of throwing (default: false)

assertConfig.title: Assert Node Config

conditionConfig.description: Condition node configuration with JSONLogic expression
conditionConfig.title: Condition Node Config

csv_parseConfig.description: CSV parse/encode node configuration for converting between CSV strings and structured data

columns.description: Column names to use. In parse mode without headers, these become the keys. In encode mode, these define column order.

hasHeaders.description: (parse mode) Whether the first row contains column headers (default true)

mode.description: Operation mode: 'parse' to convert CSV to array of objects, 'encode' to convert array of objects to CSV

source.description: Path expression or literal for the input data

csv_parseConfig.title: CSV Parse/Encode Node Config

custom_actionConfig.description: Execute a user-defined custom action backed by a Lua script

actionConfig.description: Action-specific configuration (auto-populated from the action's config schema)

custom_actionConfig.title: Custom Action Config

delayConfig.description: Delay node pauses workflow execution for a configurable duration, then passes input through unchanged

jitter.description: Optional random jitter range in seconds (+/- this value)

delayConfig.title: Delay Node Config

file_checkConfig.description: Checks if a file or directory exists on on-premise storage via a BridgeApp controller

controllerId.description: Controller ID or path expression (TypeID with 'ctl' prefix)

path.description: Absolute file path on the controller's filesystem, or path expression

file_checkConfig.title: File Check Node Config

file_deleteConfig.description: Deletes a file on on-premise storage via a BridgeApp controller

controllerId.description: Controller ID or path expression (TypeID with 'ctl' prefix)

ignoreNotFound.description: If true, succeed even if the file doesn't exist (default: false)

path.description: Absolute file path on the controller's filesystem, or path expression

file_deleteConfig.title: File Delete Node Config

file_listConfig.description: Lists directory contents on on-premise storage via a BridgeApp controller

controllerId.description: Controller ID or path expression (TypeID with 'ctl' prefix)

path.description: Absolute directory path on the controller's filesystem, or path expression

pattern.description: Optional glob pattern to filter entries (e.g. '*.xml')

file_listConfig.title: File List Node Config

file_readConfig.description: Reads file content from on-premise storage via a BridgeApp controller

controllerId.description: Controller ID or path expression (TypeID with 'ctl' prefix)

path.description: Absolute file path on the controller's filesystem, or path expression

file_readConfig.title: File Read Node Config

file_writeConfig.description: Writes content to a file on on-premise storage via a BridgeApp controller

content.description: Content to write, or path expression

controllerId.description: Controller ID or path expression (TypeID with 'ctl' prefix)

createDirectories.description: Create parent directories if they don't exist (default: true)

path.description: Absolute file path on the controller's filesystem, or path expression

file_writeConfig.title: File Write Node Config

for_eachConfig.description: Iterates over an array and executes a body node for each item

as.description: Variable name for the current item (default: 'item')

body.description: Embedded node definition to execute per item

for_eachConfig.title: For Each Node Config

graphqlConfig.description: GraphQL node configuration for executing queries and mutations against the Pulse API

variables.description: GraphQL variables. Values can be path expressions ($.input.key) or literals.

graphqlConfig.title: GraphQL Query/Mutation Node Config

http_requestConfig.description: HTTP request node configuration for device communication
http_requestConfig.title: HTTP Request Node Config

integration_actionConfig.description: Execute an action exported by an installed integration

actionConfig.description: Action-specific configuration (schema depends on the action)

actionName.description: Action name defined in the integration

integration_actionConfig.title: Integration Action Config

joinConfig.description: Join node merges 2+ inputs into a single output. Completes only when all inputs are available.

keys.description: Mapping of predecessor node IDs to output keys. If not specified, node IDs are used as keys.

strategy.description: Merge strategy: 'merge' deep-merges all input objects, 'array' collects inputs into an array, 'keyed' uses node IDs (or custom keys) as object keys

joinConfig.title: Join Node Config

json_parseConfig.description: JSON parse/encode node configuration for converting between JSON strings and structured data

mode.description: Operation mode: 'parse' to convert JSON string to object, 'encode' to convert object to JSON string

pretty.description: (encode mode only) Whether to pretty-print the JSON output

source.description: Path expression or literal for the input data to process

json_parseConfig.title: JSON Parse/Encode Node Config

logConfig.description: Logs a message to the execution log and passes input through unchanged

message.description: Log message with optional {{$.path}} template interpolation

logConfig.title: Log Node Config

messageConfig.description: Send a templated notification to a group or individual recipient.

body.description: Plain text message body with {{path}} template placeholders

bodyHtml.description: Optional HTML message body with {{path}} template placeholders

groupId.description: Notification group ID. All recipients in the group will receive the message. Mutually exclusive with recipientId.

recipientId.description: Specific recipient user ID for single-recipient messages. Mutually exclusive with groupId.

messageConfig.title: Message Node Config

microsqlConfig.description: Run a MicroSQL query against the platform's reporting engine

bindings.description: Named parameter bindings — keys match :paramName in query, values are literals or expressions

query.description: MicroSQL query with optional :paramName named parameters

microsqlConfig.title: MicroSQL Node Config

ml_predictConfig.description: Run ML model prediction with typed feature inputs

features.description: Feature values or path expressions (e.g. $.input.temperature, $.nodes.prev.output.weight) for each input feature

ml_predictConfig.title: ML Prediction Node Config

mqtt_publishConfig.description: MQTT publish node configuration. Device is optional - if present, message targets that device only.

deviceId.description: Optional device ID or path expression. If present, message is sent only to this device via DeviceActor.

rpc.description: Whether to use RPC mode (wait for response)

mqtt_publishConfig.title: MQTT Publish Node Config

producibility_auditConfig.description: Run a feasibility audit against a job's production DAG using current progress data. Returns severity, findings, and at-risk items.

jobId.description: Job ID to audit (TypeID or path expression e.g. $.input.jobId)

yieldMinProgressPercent.description: Minimum percent-complete before yield is evaluated (default 50). Below this, yield shortfalls are not flagged.

producibility_auditConfig.title: Producibility Audit Node Config

regexConfig.description: Performs regex match, extract, replace, or split operations on strings

input.description: Input string or path expression to match against

regexConfig.title: Regex Node Config

scriptConfig.description: Script node configuration. Exactly one of scriptId, scriptName, or inline must be specified.

scriptId.description: Script ID from the script table (TypeID format).

scriptName.description: Script name to look up from the script table.

timeout.description: Maximum execution time in milliseconds (default: LUA_MAX_EXECUTION_MS)

scriptConfig.title: Script Node Config

set_variableConfig.description: Sets workflow-level variables that can be read by subsequent nodes via $.variables

variables.description: Object mapping variable names to values or path expressions

set_variableConfig.title: Set Variable Node Config

splitConfig.description: Split node fans out a single input to all outgoing edges in parallel. No configuration required — simply connect multiple edges from this node.
splitConfig.title: Split Node Config

sql_queryConfig.description: SQL query node configuration for device database queries

bindings.description: Query parameter bindings (use $. path expressions to reference workflow data)

sql_queryConfig.title: SQL Query Node Config

switchConfig.description: Switch node selects one output branch from alternatives using JSONLogic predicates

cases.description: Ordered list of cases to evaluate. First matching case wins.

name.description: Branch name (must match an edge condition)

default.description: Default branch name if no case matches. Must match an edge condition.

switchConfig.title: Switch Node Config

taskConfig.description: Create a human task and wait for resolution before continuing the workflow.

assignedTeamId.description: Team to assign the task to.

description.description: Override the task description. Supports Mustache templates: {{input.key}}, {{nodes.nodeId.field}}, {{variables.key}}

taskDefinitionId.description: The task definition template to create the task from.

title.description: Override the task title (defaults to task definition name). Supports Mustache templates: {{input.key}}, {{nodes.nodeId.field}}, {{variables.key}}

taskConfig.title: Task Node Config

transformConfig.description: Transform node configuration with field mapping

mapping.description: Mapping of output keys to value specifications (path expressions, literals, or operations)

transformConfig.title: Transform Node Config

yaml_parseConfig.description: YAML parse/encode node configuration for converting between YAML strings and structured data

mode.description: Operation mode: 'parse' to convert YAML string to object, 'encode' to convert object to YAML string

source.description: Path expression or literal for the input data to process

yaml_parseConfig.title: YAML Parse/Encode Node Config
